name: Spicy Marinated Shrimp for a Crowd
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cup Dehydrated, sliced or chopped onion
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook shrimp.
2. Peel, devein, and rinse well.
3. Reconstitute the dehydrated onion in 1 1/2 cups of water.
4. Alternate layers of shrimp and onions in a large flat pan.
5. Combine remaining ingredients and pour over both shrimp and onions.
6. Cover and refrigerate overnight.
7. Drain and serve in lettuce cups.
8. Garnish with tomato and cucumber.
